sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-governorates/geonames-admin1-sy.txt
rawFiles.notes: Filtered admin1CodesASCII rows where the code starts with SY.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-governorates/geonames-sy-admin1-records.txt
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.zip rows for the 14 GeoNames ADM1 records used by the governorate seed.

transforms: Filtered GeoNames admin-1 rows to records with an SY prefix.
Matched GeoNames rows to Wikidata records by shared GeoNames IDs and ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes.
Used GeoNames names as English aliases where they differ from the canonical governorate display name.
Imported GeoNames ADM1 latitude and longitude values as seed centroid coordinates.
reviewNotes: Seeded the 14 Syria admin-1 rows from GeoNames and cross-checked identifiers against Wikidata. GeoNames ADM1 coordinates are used as seed representative centroids and should be reviewed against boundary-derived centroids later.
